testcase.name: test_assign_multiple_auto_due_date

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == '2026-06-05' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7dbf5c22c340>('due_date') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7dbf5c22c340> = {'assigned_at': '2026-06-04T15:16:13.965404', 'employee_email': 'mitarbeiter@infometrica.de', 'employee_id': 'emp-001', 'employee_name': 'Max Mitarbeiter', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_referrals_and_due_date.py:101: in test_assign_multiple_auto_due_date assert a.get("due_date") == expected E AssertionError: assert None == '2026-06-05' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7dbf5c22c340>('due_date') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7dbf5c22c340> = {'assigned_at': '2026-06-04T15:16:13.965404', 'employee_email': 'mitarbeiter@infometrica.de', 'employee_id': 'emp-001', 'employee_name': 'Max Mitarbeiter', ...}.get
